title: geum geniculatum
intro: Geum geniculatum, also known as the prairie avens, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Geum geniculatum include the potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
